description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has three jobs: build_linux, build_osx, and build_windows. The build_linux job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of GCC and Clang compilers, building with different C++ standards and build types. The build_osx job runs on macOS-latest with Clang and C++11. The build_windows job runs on windows-latest with a matrix of Visual Studio versions.
